title: Sarigamapadani
subTitle: Kulasekaran, a casanova, tries to seduce Sangita but his actions push her away. Later, he falls in love with Archana but is unaware of her real identity.

title: Villadhi Villain
subTitle: Meenatchi Sundara Sasthiriyaar, an eminent lawyer, is against the relationship of his daughter with Edison. When Edison is charged for the murder of a minister, he seeks Meenatchi's help.

title: Vaidhegi Vanthachu
subTitle: A naive Karupan is forced by his lecherous MLA boss to marry a girl who snubbed the politician. The unwilling bride, turning vengeance into redemption, decides to reform her husband.

title: Udhaya
subTitle: Udhaya falls in love with Vasanthi, but realises that she is already engaged. Later, when he is wrongly framed for a crime, she strives to prove his innocence.

title: Varuvan Manikandan
subTitle: An ardent devotee of Lord Ayyappan narrates tales of various miracles performed by the Hindu deity where the Almighty tests the devotion of his followers.

title: Virumbugiren
subTitle: When Shivan is forced to take up his father's job, he falls in love with Thavamani while posted in a village. However, he faces several problems as her father and the villagers are against their love.

title: En Jeevan Paduthu
subTitle: A woman falls in love with a ghost after she listens to his tragic love story. Later, just as she is trying to come to terms with her feelings, her marriage gets fixed with a rich man.

title: Unnai Thedi
subTitle: Raghu travels to New Zealand with a friend and meets Malavika, whom he falls in love with. However, circumstances force them to part ways.

title: Varuvan Manikandan
subTitle: An ardent devotee of Lord Ayyappan narrates tales of various miracles performed by the Hindu deity where the Almighty tests the devotion of his followers.

title: Varuvan Manikandan
subTitle: An ardent devotee of Lord Ayyappan narrates tales of various miracles performed by the Hindu deity where the Almighty tests the devotion of his followers.

title: Thalattu Padava
subTitle: Raja, an educated young man, works as a driver for a rich client and gets harassed by his granddaughter. When she realises how learned he is, she falls in love with him and wishes to marry him.

title: En Jeevan Paduthu
subTitle: A woman falls in love with a ghost after she listens to his tragic love story. Later, just as she is trying to come to terms with her feelings, her marriage gets fixed with a rich man.

title: Unnai Thedi
subTitle: Raghu travels to New Zealand with a friend and meets Malavika, whom he falls in love with. However, circumstances force them to part ways.

title: Sena
subTitle: Sena, a hard working man, works for a criminal named Masthan, to help his brother Arvind in becoming a lawyer. Problems arise when Arvind is killed by Masthan for raising his voice against him.

title: Paarai
subTitle: Durai Raj, a lorry driver, has only one friend, Jayaram. However, when his friend dies, Durai Raj strives to support his family.

title: Kattu Paya Sir Intha Kaali
subTitle: Bringing the best in cinema.

title: Muraimaman
subTitle: When his eloped sister and her lover return, Sirusu and his brother welcome them. Later, Sirusu falls in love with his sister's daughter, Indhu.

title: Kaaval
subTitle: An honest police officer is given the task of taking down a notorious criminal. However, things go haywire when his carefully planned operation is leaked to the rivals.

title: Senthamizh Paattu
subTitle: Despite his mother's objection to singing songs, Bala develops an interest in music. He falls in love with Durga, a rich girl with whose family his mother's miseries are interlinked.

title: Oru Melliya Kodu
subTitle: A deceased woman's husband becomes a suspect after her body goes missing from the morgue. The disappearance exposes a web of lies and deceit when things unravel.

title: Irudhi Suttru
subTitle: A failed boxer sees potential in a roadside fish-seller and begins to train her to compete in the women's boxing category in the Olympics.
